SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationCodeBlockWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationContainerElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationDocumentWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationInlineCodeWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationLineBreakWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationReferenceWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationSectionWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTableCellWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTableColumnWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTableRowWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationBlockElement, AIcDocumentationCodeBlock, AIcDocumentationContainerElement, AIcDocumentationDocument, AIcDocumentationElement, AIcDocumentationInlineCode, AIcDocumentationInlineElement, AIcDocumentationLineBreak, AIcDocumentationLink, AIcDocumentationParagraph, AIcDocumentationReference, AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget, AIcDocumentationSection, AIcDocumentationTable, AIcDocumentationTableCell, AIcDocumentationTableColumn, AIcDocumentationTableRow, AIcDocumentationText
public interface AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess extends AIiDocumentationElement
Provides write access to a renderer-neutral documentation element.

The read-only contract is defined by AIiDocumentationElement. This capability interface is intended for construction, aggregation, and model-processing phases. Validators, renderers, and other read-only consumers should depend on AIiDocumentationElement instead.
